initial_prompt:
Super-Eywa v1 runtime prompt snapshot.
Turn index: 1
Node depth: 0
Allowed decisions: ['delegate']
Prompt family: delegate
Base header prompt: ''
Selected prompt text:
Decompose the problem into a maximum of 2 focused subproblems that allow for independent analysis of the input components. Ensure each subproblem is distinct and provides a necessary piece of information for the final synthesis.

Return exactly one JSON object in this format:
{
  "schema_name": "eywa_node_response",
  "schema_version": "v1",
  "orchestration_decision": "delegate",
  "decision_notes": "optional string",
  "helpers": [
    {
      "label": "helper_1",
      "instructions": "plain-text subproblem for the first helper"
    }
  ],
  "synthesis_brief": "how the parent should combine the child results"
}

Question:
Solve this Super-Eywa grading-bank question.
Question ID: architecture-derived-B7-sarcasm-classification
Title: B7. Sarcasm Classification

Problem:
Classify three Reddit replies as sarcastic (0) or non-sarcastic (1).
Determine the 3-bit pattern.

Grading target:
Exact match on the 3-bit string.

Return format:
FINAL_ANSWER: <your answer>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>
final_prompt:
Super-Eywa v1 runtime prompt snapshot.
Turn index: 2
Node depth: 0
Allowed decisions: ['execute_locally']
Prompt family: delegate
Base header prompt: ''
Selected prompt text:
Child results have already come back to you. Use them to produce the final response yourself. Return exactly one JSON object in this format:
{
  "schema_name": "eywa_node_response",
  "schema_version": "v1",
  "orchestration_decision": "execute_locally",
  "decision_notes": "optional string",
  "response": "string",
  "result_type": "optional string"
}
Additional instruction prompt profiles: []
System prompt:


User prompt:
Child results have already come back to you. Use them to produce the final response yourself. Return exactly one JSON object in this format:
{
  "schema_name": "eywa_node_response",
  "schema_version": "v1",
  "orchestration_decision": "execute_locally",
  "decision_notes": "optional string",
  "response": "string",
  "result_type": "optional string"
}

Synthesis brief from the earlier child-creation step:
Combine the three individual classifications (0 or 1) into a single 3-bit string (e.g., '010') to form the FINAL_ANSWER. Provide a brief justification explaining why each reply was classified as sarcastic or non-sarcastic.

Child results already returned to you:
[
  {
    "node_id": "node_root_helper_01",
    "summary": "FINAL_ANSWER: Cannot classify without input text\nJUSTIFICATION: No Reddit replies were provided to analyze."
  }
]
